DP.285.0000:
Please find a partner from the Trainers
that are gathered here.\f
DP.285.0001:
[0103,0000], you have not found
a partner for your tag team.\f
Would you like to quit looking and
return to the reception counter?
DP.285.0002:
Thank you for choosing a partner.\f
I will now show you to your
Multi Battle Room.\f
DP.285.0003:
Riley: The partners I have now?\f
Well, my [0100,0000]’s nasty with its
[0106,0001].\f
And there’s my [0100,0002], which
is a sure hand with [0106,0003].\f
Would you like to team up with me?
DP.285.0004:
Riley: ...Oh, is that so?
That’s too bad.
DP.285.0005:
Riley: Ahaha, thanks.
I’ll be waiting for you.\f
DP.285.0006:
Cheryl: I have [0100,0000] that
is very good with [0106,0001],\f
and [0100,0002] that likes to
show off its [0106,0003].\f
Will you team up with me again?
DP.285.0008: Cheryl: I’ll go on ahead, then.\f
DP.285.0009:
Buck: Yo, are you looking to team
up? Let me tell you what I’ve got.\f
My [0100,0000]’s first-rate
with [0106,0001].\f
And my [0100,0002] is the best when
it comes to using [0106,0003].\f
You want to go with me, don’t you?
DP.285.0010:
Buck: Huh? What?
That’s pretty cold of you!
DP.285.0011:
Buck: Hehehe! Good choice!
There’s no problem when I’m around!\f
DP.285.0012:
Marley: ...My [0100,0000] uses
[0106,0001] well...\f
And my [0100,0002] likes to use
[0106,0003].\f
...What do you want?
Am I supposed to go with you?
DP.285.0015:
Mira: Hi, hi!
I’m with my [0100,0000]!\r
It’s really good with [0106,0001]!\f
The other one is my [0100,0002].
Its [0106,0003] is awesome!\f
[0103,0004], do you want to
go with me?
DP.285.0016:
Mira: Oh, OK.
Let’s go another time!
DP.285.0017:
Mira: OK! I’ll wait for you!
[0103,0000], don’t be long!\f
